notable_phrases: very difficult to predict beyond June
given the uncertainty we see from several factors, we aren't providing the category level of color today
I wouldn't want to predict the future because I'm not sure what will happen with the tariffs
summary: Apple reported solid Q2 results with record services revenue and announced $500 billion U.S. investment, but management repeatedly declined to provide detailed guidance beyond June quarter due to tariff uncertainty and ongoing Section 232 investigation, while analysts aggressively probed supply chain shifts, tariff impacts, and demand trends.
